calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: James Kaller for and with Benito Guevara

Mr. Kaller stated that Mr. Guevara had the original will after his father died, has looked all over for the file the will was kept, and at least one sibling as seen the original will. Mr. Guevara stated that he had the file at home with important papers, but can't find it, and it's been over 10 years. Mr. Guevara also stated that all 7 of his siblings are aware of the will, it is very possible they all saw it, and that he is sure Cynthia saw it. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). No Bond is required. Status on Close of Estate is set for January, 6, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
